title: Hephaestus Expansion
description: A Hephaestus addon that adds more weapons!
body:
## ![spear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0563b8315e9492f81ce663cbfc3c118093bd2f02.png)**Hephaestus Expansion**![Spear2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/627317373994548592f70b3a1457354e299606d8.png)

A [Hephaestus](https://modrinth.com/mod/hephaestus) add-on that introduces a handful of new weapons to tinker around with. 

[![X (formerly Twitter) Follow](https://img.shields.io/twitter/follow/tiigerbones?style=for-the-badge&logo=X&color=grey)](https://twitter.com/tiigerbones) ![GitHub last commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/tiigerbones/hephaestusexpansion?display_timestamp=author&style=for-the-badge&logo=Github&color=grey) [![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1344324?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&labelColor=grey&color=grey)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hephaestus-expansion)



## **Current Arsenal**

## **More Info**

Future plans include adding more variations, custom traits, and unique counterparts for each weapon.
Also Better Combat compat should improve as I figure it out.

Make sure to check out the optional dependencies!

Texture help - [Septiral](https://twitter.com/FiendishFerret) go check out their Socials!

## To-do

- Create custom textures for Mythic Metals materials similiar to the mods style for each weapon
- Give each weapon a custom trait instead of using tinker's
- Add new weapon type twinblade
- Add new weapon type rapier


Feel free to make suggestions on [Github](https://github.com/tiigerbones/hephaestusexpansion/issues)

Using code and link [TIIGERBONES](https://bisecthosting.com/TIIGERBONES 'Bisect Hosting') to get 25% off your first month
